# Tobias Meixner

> Tobias Meixner is a tracking specialist and web freelancer from Würzburg,
> Germany. Focus: Google Tag Manager, GA4, Server-Side Tracking via Stape.io,
> Consent Mode v2 (DSGVO/GDPR-compliant) and CRM integration for German SMEs
> and B2B SaaS. Plus lean website implementation on a template basis.
>
> Tobias Meixner ist Tracking-Spezialist und Web-Freelancer aus Würzburg.
> Schwerpunkt: Google Tag Manager, GA4, Server-Side Tracking via Stape.io,
> Consent Mode v2 (DSGVO-konform) und CRM-Anbindung für deutsche KMU und
> B2B-SaaS. Plus schlanke Website-Umsetzung auf Template-Basis.

## About / Über mich

Tobias Meixner is a freelancer since February 2026, studying E-Commerce at
THWS (Technische Hochschule Würzburg-Schweinfurt). Location: Würzburg, Bavaria.
Languages: German (native), English. Google Ads certified (cert ID 166956880,
https://skillshop.credential.net/7c7f49fe-c3ff-481c-b22b-fb7470d94dd5) and
Google Analytics certified (cert ID 185483479,
https://skillshop.credential.net/61df521c-ab65-49c0-aa1b-6020be5c740c).

Specialisations: tracking implementations (GTM, GA4, server-side via Stape.io),
DSGVO/GDPR compliance (Consent Mode v2, CMP integration), cross-domain tracking,
lead-source attribution, CRM integration (HubSpot, Pipedrive), Google Ads
conversion tracking with Enhanced Conversions, template-based website
implementation with technical SEO foundation.

Clients/Projects: Gumb AG (complete GTM/GA4 tracking ecosystem with server-side
considerations, Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversions, Enhanced Conversions,
Consent Mode v2), Stefanie Mischka (website + ongoing maintenance).

Technologies: Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics 4, Stape.io, Consent Mode v2,
CookieScript, Cookiebot, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Schema.org JSON-LD, HTML, CSS,
JavaScript, Cloudflare Workers (Resend email).

## Services / Leistungen

### Main services (3 core offerings) — tier-based pricing

- [GTM & GA4 Setup](/en/services/) — focus area. Three complexity tiers:
  * Basic: from €390 (1 domain, 2-3 events, Consent Mode v2, no CRM)
  * Standard: €800-1,200 (5+ events, DataLayer planning, Custom Dimensions/
    Conversions, cross-domain, extensive handover)
  * B2B SaaS: €1,300-2,500 (+ CRM integration, custom integrations like
    Intercom, lead-source/UTM attribution end-to-end)
- [Website Implementation](/en/services/) — template-based, technically clean:
  * Basic: from €890 (3-5 pages, modern template, SSL, hosting, Schema.org)
  * Extended: €1,500-3,000 (6-10 pages, individual sections, SEO copywriting)
  * Multi-language or shop integration: individual quote
- [Care-free package](/en/services/) — from €49/month (Starter) or €99/month
  (Plus). Starter: hosting, SSL, small changes, direct contact, technical
  support. Plus: additionally tracking maintenance (events & GA4 health),
  monthly mini-reporting, priority response, more capacity for changes.

### Tracking extensions (folded into fixed-price quote)

These are common additions to the base setup. No fixed list price - they get
factored into the fixed-price quote based on actual scope. With a combined
website order, all tracking extensions come with a 20% bundle discount.

- Cross-Domain Tracking - multiple domains/subdomains as one session (e.g.
  marketing site + app subdomain)
- Server-Side Tracking via Stape.io - own sGTM container with custom
  subdomain; better data quality, longer cookie lifetime, fewer ad-blocker
  losses
- Google Ads Conversion Tracking - Conversion Linker, Enhanced Conversions,
  Conversion Import
- CRM Integration - HubSpot, Pipedrive etc. via GTM (UTM attribution to
  contacts, events sent to CRM, lead-source tracking)
- Custom integrations - Intercom, Klaviyo, Segment, custom webhooks, etc.

### Combined offerings

- Website + Tracking bundle: 20% discount on tracking base setup and all
  selected tracking modules (server-side, Google Ads, CRM) when booked
  together with a website order.
- For complex setups (B2B SaaS, multi-domain, multiple modules combined,
  custom integrations like Intercom): individual fixed-price quote after
  a short call, typically in the low four-figure range (real example:
  €1,100 for GTM/GA4 + CRM + Intercom + cross-domain + custom dimensions).

Meta Pixel and CAPI: not in the standard offer by design. Foundation
(consent, sGTM, CAPI-ready subdomain) prepared so a paid-ads specialist
can take over the implementation cleanly.


## Blog Articles / Blog-Artikel

- [Answer Engine Optimization](/en/blog/answer-engine-optimization/):
  How websites get found in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews.
  Data-based guide with concrete steps. Updated 2026.
- [Server-Side Tracking 2026](/en/blog/server-side-tracking/):
  Why client-side tracking loses 30-40% of conversions and how server-side
  GTM (via Stape.io) prevents this. Pillar article covering data loss,
  architecture, costs, FAQ.
- [Stape.io einrichten in 30 Minuten](/blog/stape-io-einrichten/):
  Step-by-step setup guide for Stape.io managed server-side GTM hosting -
  6 steps from account creation to GA4 test in DebugView. Covers DNS,
  custom subdomain naming (avoiding ad-blocker detection), Cloudflare proxy
  warning, GDPR/Consent Mode v2 check. With HowTo schema markup.
- [Meta CAPI via Server-Side GTM](/blog/meta-capi-server-side-gtm/):
  Complete guide to setting up Meta Conversions API via server-side GTM
  with event_id deduplication, hashed PII (SHA-256) and Event Match Quality
  (EMQ) optimization to 8.0+ for 15-25% better attributed conversions.
  5 steps from event_id setup to EMQ check, with HowTo schema markup.
- [Google Ads Enhanced Conversions via Server-Side GTM](/blog/google-ads-enhanced-conversions/):
  Complete guide to setting up Google Ads Enhanced Conversions via sGTM -
  lifting match rate from 60-70% (GCLID-only) to 90%+ via hash-matched
  user data (email, phone). 5-10% more measured conversions average,
  YouTube campaigns median +17%. Covers Conversion Linker, user_data
  dataLayer, sGTM Conversion tag, EC activation, match rate diagnostics,
  and the common double-hashing mistake (~30% of setups). Includes
  Conversion Import / Enhanced Conversions for Leads for B2B CRM flows.
  Unified web+leads setting since April 2026. HowTo + FAQ schema.
- [Bypassing Safari ITP](/blog/safari-itp-umgehen/):
  Deep-dive on Safari's Intelligent Tracking Prevention - 7-day cookie cap
  since 2019, IP-Matching rule since Safari 16.4 (April 2023) that caps
  even server-set cookies if sGTM server IP doesn't match main site IP.
  Why CNAME cloaking is dead since 2020. Solution: Same-Origin Path-Based
  sGTM (example.com/sgtm via Cloudflare Worker or Stape Custom Loader
  Power-Up) extending cookie lifetime from 7 to 400 days. Includes
  Worker code example, ITP Debug Mode test procedure, business impact
  table (3-30% attribution loss depending on sales cycle), and GDPR
  considerations. HowTo + FAQ schema.
- [Performance Max vs. Advantage+](/en/blog/performance-max-vs-advantage-plus/):
  Comparison of Google and Meta AI campaign types. With ROAS benchmarks
  and decision guide by budget.
- [Prompt Engineering for E-Commerce](/en/blog/prompt-engineering-ecommerce/):
  Five prompt strategies (Zero-Shot, Few-Shot, Role Prompting, Constraint,
  Chain-of-Thought) for better AI-generated product descriptions. Based on
  peer-reviewed research (Chen et al. 2025; Sahoo et al. 2024; Brown et al. 2020).

## Projects / Projekte

- [Gumb AG Tracking](/en/projects/): Built a complete GTM/GA4 tracking
  ecosystem for the DACH market - GTM container, GA4 with server-side
  considerations, Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversions, Enhanced Conversions,
  Consent Mode v2.
- [Stefanie Mischka Website](/en/projects/): Built and maintains a complete
  business website with hosting, SSL, and ongoing technical care.
- [Personal site meixner-tobias.com](/en/projects/): HTML/CSS/JS,
  GitHub Pages hosting, full GTM/GA4 tracking with custom dimensions,
  complete schema.org markup, llms.txt protocol.

GA4 Implementierung DSGVO, Consent Mode v2 einrichten, Server-Side Tracking
Stape.io Deutschland, sGTM Container aufsetzen, HubSpot UTM-Attribution GTM,
B2B SaaS Tracking Freelancer, Cross-Domain Tracking GA4, Schema Markup
Anleitung, Website-Umsetzung Template Würzburg, CRM-Anbindung GTM,
Sorglos-Betreuung Website, DSGVO-konformes Tracking KMU.

## Technical Details

Last updated: June 23, 2026
Languages: German (DE), English (EN) with hreflang
Region: Germany, DACH, Bavaria
Pricing model: VAT-exempt small business (§19 UStG) - prices are final
Legal notice: https://meixner-tobias.com/impressum/
Privacy policy: https://meixner-tobias.com/datenschutz/
Tech stack: HTML/CSS/JS, hosted on GitHub Pages, GTM/GA4 tracking with
custom dimensions, full schema.org markup (Person, Service, Offer, FAQPage,
Article, BreadcrumbList), llms.txt protocol, AI bots explicitly allowed
in robots.txt (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended,
ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, Applebot-Extended, Meta-ExternalAgent, etc.).
